message:
feat(stdlib): add type inference for bisect, textwrap, socket, functools, operator, heapq, collections

- Add type inference for bisect module (bisect_left/right return int, insort returns none)
- Add type inference for textwrap module (fill/dedent/indent/shorten return string)
- Add type inference for socket module (gethostname/inet_aton/ntoa return string)
- Add type inference for heapq module (heappop returns int, heapify returns none)
- Add type inference for functools module (reduce returns int)
- Add type inference for operator module (add/sub/mul return int, truediv returns float)
- Add type inference for collections module (Counter returns counter type, deque returns deque)
- Fix bisect_mod.zig to use pointer reference instead of .items for arrays
- Fix time_mod.zig to use std.Thread.sleep instead of deprecated std.time.sleep
- Fix analyzer.zig to detect collections module calls and enable hashmap_helper import
- Increase fnv_hash branch quota to 10000 for larger switch statements
